            try tauto

          rw [h9] at hb
          exact hb

        intro h4
        have h5 : f a ∈ f '' X2 := by
          simpa using h4
        have h6 : f a ∈ f '' X1 := by
          rw [h1] at h5
          exact h5
        rcases h6 with ⟨b, hb, h7⟩
        have h8 : f b = f a := by

        have h9 : b = a := by
          apply hf.1
          all_goals
            try tauto
            try linarith
        have h10 : a ∈ X1 := by
          rw [h9] at hb
          exact hb

    intro Y
    use f⁻¹ '' Y
    ext a
    simp [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_preimage]
